process_details: Melt at 441.15 K for 5 min, then quench with liquid N2.
notes: Quench cooling 441.15 K, 5 min. Stored over P2O5 (RH~0%) at 4 C for 21 days. Excess NAP recrystallized at day 21 (Fig 6, peak ~19.1 deg). Original mole ratio nomenclature in source: '2:1' (NAP:IND in source's table header but IND-rich in mass-based composition for 2:1 and 1:2).
